title: Mutant Zombie cooler
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Mutant Zombie coolers''' were an [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverage that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] had a special recipe for mixing double-strength.

==Appearances==
*''[[Assault at Selonia]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
